name: Donna's Peanut Butter Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. This recipe is made in an electric skillet.
2. Combine sugar, butter, and milk. Set the temperature to 280°F (138°C).
3. Stir constantly and boil for 5 - 7 minutes until it reaches a soft ball stage (235-240°F/112-115°C on a thermometer).
4. Turn off the heat and add marshmallows, peanut butter, and vanilla extract.
5. Blend together well.
6. Pour into an 8-inch square pan that has been greased with butter.
7. Let cool before cutting into squares.
